# Letter of Intent (LOI) - Design Partner Agreement

**SEIZN DESIGN PARTNER PROGRAM**

---

## Parties

**Provider:** Seizn Inc. (to be incorporated)
**Partner:** [Company Name]
**Contact:** [Name, Email, Phone]
**Date:** [YYYY-MM-DD]

---

## 1. Purpose

This Letter of Intent establishes a non-binding framework for [Company Name] ("Partner") to participate in Seizn's Design Partner Program during the pre-launch beta period.

## 2. Program Benefits

Partner will receive:
- [ ] Early access to Seizn platform (Spring/Summer/Fall/Winter)
- [ ] Priority onboarding support (1:1 sessions)
- [ ] Dedicated Slack/Discord channel
- [ ] Input on product roadmap and features
- [ ] **Founding Partner pricing** (locked for 12 months post-launch)
- [ ] Case study co-marketing opportunity

## 3. Partner Commitments

Partner agrees to:
- [ ] Dedicate engineering resources for integration (estimated: ___ hours)
- [ ] Provide feedback on UX, performance, and feature gaps
- [ ] Share anonymized usage metrics for product improvement
- [ ] Participate in 2-4 check-in calls during pilot period
- [ ] Consider paid subscription upon Seizn's commercial launch

## 4. Pilot Scope

| Item | Details |
|------|---------|
| **Use Case** | [e.g., Internal knowledge search, Customer support RAG] |
| **Data Volume** | [e.g., 50K documents, 100K queries/month] |
| **Success Criteria** | [e.g., 20% latency reduction, 15% cost savings] |
| **Duration** | [e.g., 4 weeks starting YYYY-MM-DD] |

## 5. Pricing Intent

Upon commercial launch, Partner intends to subscribe to:
- [ ] **Plus** ($29/month) - Up to 100K memories
- [ ] **Pro** ($99/month) - Up to 1M memories
- [ ] **Enterprise** (Custom) - Unlimited + SLA

*Final pricing subject to published rates at launch.*

## 6. Confidentiality

Both parties agree to keep pilot results, pricing discussions, and technical details confidential unless mutually agreed for case study publication.

## 7. Non-Binding Nature

This LOI is a statement of intent and does not create legally binding obligations. Formal agreements will be executed upon Seizn's incorporation.
